channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 15th July
item.description:
Graffiti tagging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Drysdale Street, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th July
item.description:
More junk in this spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worn out markings, lights not working properly with faded shade, 15th July
item.description:
The local road conditions are already dangerous and dramatic enough let alone current markings and management systems to make conditions safe for pedestrians not functioning as they should. Saw 3 cars not stop within 2 minutes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Signal Blocked by Foliage, 15th July
item.description:
Pole 1 and Pole 2 have foliage obstructing them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Ann's Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by pavement, 15th July
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayow Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign needs cleaning and straightening, 15th July
item.description:
Sign circled in photo needs showing some soap and water as dirty and needs straightening up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing public bin, 15th July
item.description:
Frequently overflowing bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenninghall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 mattresses, bed frame, sofa and bin, 15th July
item.description:
2 mattresses, bed frame, sofa and bin Have been dumped next to the Welcome convenience shop’s bin cages. Occurred today on 15th July 2026 afternoon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pope Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing water/leak, 15th July
item.description:
This leak has been 14 days and counting. Its disappointing that after numerous reports its still.not sorting. A lot of water is being wasted by thames water by not fixing it. With such a heat wave and no rain for a while I would have expected thames water to fix especially in residential areas. We have leaks both side of this road a lot of water is being wasted by Thames water!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beanshaw, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th July
item.description:
Rubbish by black communication cabinet has been at location and added to over last 2-3 days. Bags under fly tipping sign - last 24-48 hours. Both in direct sunlight for much of day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tweedy Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 lime bikes abandoned, 15th July
item.description:
3 Lime bikes abandoned, one blocking a driveway. 2 are in photo at GPS location, one is about 15 metres up the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters, 15th July
item.description:
5 canisters dumped dumped on the pavement opposite 81 Rutherglen Road SE2

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakmere Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown hedge, 15th July
item.description:
The whole length of the hedge running alongside the footpath needs cutty back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dickens Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left in road and driveway, 15th July
item.description:
Frustrating to see so many abandoned so often - just reporting this so the council can flag the increasing issue to Lime bike owner company

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ivy has covered up bench completely, 15th July
item.description:
And are starting to obstruct the steps. Can only just see bench now, certainly can't sit on it. The ivy is out of control and engulfing other shrubs, as well as the seating.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridge Close, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypost, 15th July
item.description:
1 local business flypost on this bus shelter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 431, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)
